keys.description: Per-tenant active coupon list (filtered by is_active=true AND within valid window). Read by SDUI coupon list + validate endpoint's index scan.
Code -> {coupon_id, is_active, valid_from, valid_until, usage_count, usage_cap, discount config} lookup. Read hot on every validate / preview / redeem path.
Single coupon full row + config. Read by admin UI + redemption path.
Per-customer redemption count for a specific coupon (used to enforce per_customer_limit). Read on every validate/preview/redeem call.
Redemptions on a specific target (invoice/membership/transaction). Read to enforce is_stackable checks + prevent duplicate redemption on the same target.
Cached weekly report response. period_key = period_start-period_end in ISO 8601. Powers the /coupons/report endpoint's non-hot path.
IP-bucket for coupon.rate_limit middleware. Increments on every validate + preview call; expires on the hour boundary.
invalidatedBy: hourly boundary (natural expiry — never manually invalidated)

keys.description: User-bucket for coupon.rate_limit middleware. Higher cap than IP (authenticated users get more headroom).
Rolling count of recent COUPON_NOT_FOUND / COUPON_INACTIVE refusals per IP. Reads by fraud-detection layer to escalate persistent enumeration attempts to a 403.
